title: Tree Tap
description: Extract juicy stuff from tree trunks
body:
With this mod you extract fluids from trees using a tree tap with a bucket dangling under it.

 

The mod brings a single item, the tree tap, which can be attached to a log or other valid block. Right click the tap holding a bucket to place a sap collector under it.

 

The mod does not have any default extraction recipes as it's meant for modpacks to add its own recipes depending on which fluids and items the pack has.

 

Has compatibility with TerraFirmaCraft wooden bucket.
